confidenceReason: Every harness artifact was read and every catalog command executed.
evidenceSummary: The entry point, routed guidance, and sensor catalog cover setup through handoff and agree with the contract and runbooks; one sensor command name is stale.

basis.statement: All harness artifacts were read; routed references were followed to their targets.

findings.condition: The entry point, routed guides, and sensor catalog address setup, scoped work, verification, and handoff, and spot-checks against the contract and runbooks found no contradictions.

criteria.criterion: Harness artifacts cover setup, scoped work, verification, and handoff; agree with the contract and runbooks; and route to sensors that run as recorded.

effect.statement: Agents get complete, coherent steering, supporting the target rating across the harness factors.

evidence.statement: The lifecycle coverage table maps each work phase to a harness artifact; contradiction spot-checks across contract and runbook references came back clean.

findings.statement: The harness covers the agent work lifecycle and its guidance agrees with the material it routes to.

basis.statement: Both the recorded and current command names were executed.

findings.condition: The catalog records the pre-rename command; the current command name differs, and the old name fails with a not-found error rather than a redirect.

criteria.criterion: Harness artifacts cover setup, scoped work, verification, and handoff; agree with the contract and runbooks; and route to sensors that run as recorded.
criteria.rationale: A stale command turns a routed sensor into a dead end for a fresh session.

effect.statement: A fresh agent following the catalog hits a not-found error on the invariant suite until it discovers the rename.

evidence.statement: The catalog entry's command fails with not-found; the renamed command runs the suite successfully.

findings.statement: The sensor catalog's invariant-suite command name is one rename behind.

summary: The entry point, routed guidance, and sensor catalog cover setup through handoff and agree with the contract and runbooks; one sensor command name is stale.
